title: bogdankostic - GitHub
text:
GitHub Profile: bogdankostic (bogdankostic)
Bio: Machine Learning Engineer
Location: Berlin, Germany
Top Languages: MDX, Jupyter Notebook, Python

Top Projects:
- deepset-ai/haystack (24600 stars, MDX): Open-source AI orchestration framework for building context-engineered, production-ready LLM applications. Design modular pipelines and agent workflows with explicit control over retrieval, routing…
- notion-exporter (19 stars, Python): 🚀 A Python package to seamlessly export your Notion pages to Markdown!
- mmonimon/mensa-skill (4 stars, Python): This skill for Alexa provides information on the menu of German canteens.
- Coreference-Resolution (4 stars, Python): A mention-pair coreference resolution system implemented in Python3.
- TextClassification (0 stars, Python): A Python Library for simple text classification
- fabiomolignoni/KDI-transport (0 stars, Python): Course project of "Knowledge and Data Integration" at UNITN - A.Y. 2019-2020
- llm-prompt-perturbation (4 stars, Jupyter Notebook): Code accompanying the paper “Same Meaning, Different Scores: Lexical and Syntactic Sensitivity in LLM Evaluation”
- notion-haystack (1 stars, Python): 📓 A Haystack component to extract Notion pages to Documents.
